Our interactions with Brandon, our construction superintendent, were friendly every time. He informed us of everything that was installed in the house. Every meeting with him was pleasant and exciting since we got to see more progress on our house. He had the house built perfectly, minus any small repairs, but those were fixed afterwards with the help of our customer success manager Johnny. Johnny has been on it from day one. He has been incredible in getting all of our small fixes addressed. We gave him a decent list of fixes and he was able to schedule almost all of them in the same day. We appreciate that so much. Overall everyone we worked with had our best interest at heart and seemed to genuinely care about our need and decisions with the house and home buying process. Things take time, especially with it being a brand new community and we appreciate everyone we worked with at KB. I highly recommend these people at KB Homes. Our entire process had its ups and downs with anxiety, stress, and excitement. Our people at KB helped with everything we needed and more. The house and neighborhood are incredible. title: “A Consistently Exceptional Experience — My 3rd KB Home”
review_text: This is the third home I’ve purchased from KB Home, and my experience this time has only reinforced why I continue to choose them. From the very beginning of the home‑buying journey to the moment I moved in, KB Home has consistently delivered a process that is smooth, transparent, and truly customer‑focused. The entire experience—from the initial purchase to design selections, construction updates, and final move‑in—was incredibly well‑organized. At every stage, the team delivered exactly what they promised. Communication was always timely, clear, and proactive, which made me feel supportedand confident throughout the process. The quality and value of my new home are outstanding, just as with my previous KB homes. The craftsmanship is solid, the floorplan is thoughtful, and the personalization options allowed me to create a home that feels uniquely mine. It’s clear that KB Home takes pride in building homes that balance comfort, style, and long‑term durability. I also want to highlight how exceptional the builder’s team has been. Every person I interacted with—sales, construction, customer care—was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely committed to ensuring I was happy with my home. They kept their word, responded quickly, and made the entire experience feel stress‑free. For anyone considering building with KB Home, I can confidently say that my repeated experience speaks for itself. They offer a transparent process, excellent communication, and a well‑built home tailored to your needs. I highly recommend them to any potential buyer looking for quality and reliability.

title: Mostly positive with some hiccups.
review_text: We purchased a home in the Somerset community in Palm Coast through KB Home (contract signed mid-2025), expecting a straightforward build process with the promised December 2025/January 2026 closing timeline. Unfortunately, our experience has been one of the most frustrating we’ve had in homebuying. The issues started early with the sales agent (Paulette Alves), who dismissed a reasonable offer on a move-in-ready home without presenting it, later misrepresented a $7,500 incentive that didn’t apply after we signed, and provided repeated false updates on construction progress (e.g., claimingthe lot was graded and a permit was pending when neither was true—verified directly with the Palm Coast Building Department). These misrepresentations created unnecessary delays and stress, especially as first-time expectant parents planning around a February 2026 due date. Communication deteriorated further: the agent made unprofessional comments about our realtor and reportedly negative remarks about us to others. After we formally requested a new agent (Donna R., who has been excellent and professional), a no-contact directive was issued—yet the original agent texted us the same day, violating KB Home’s own instructions. Construction quality concerns emerged as well. We discovered improper installation of the exterior water barrier (house wrap)—seams not taped correctly, material installed upside-down in places—which is a critical moisture-protection layer. This raised serious worries about long-term water intrusion risks if not corrected promptly. We escalated to leadership (including a call and follow-ups with a director of sales) requesting fair compensation (closing costs coverage to offset added expenses from delays and stress) along with timeline clarity and permanent removal of the problematic agent. While some progress occurred on the permit and a new agent assignment, we never received meaningful compensation or full accountability for the pattern of issues. Positives: • The new sales agent (Donna R.) has been consistently responsive, helpful, and professional. • Superintendent Stacy F has been great to work with—communicative, on top of the project, and genuinely focused on getting things done right. • The community location has appeal (near beaches, I-95, etc.), and the base home design is solid for the price point. Overall, KB Home in this community seems inconsistent—great when things go smoothly (especially with the right people like Donna and Stacy involved), but poor at handling problems, transparency, or customer goodwill when they don’t. The repeated misinformation, boundary violations, and quality shortcuts left us feeling undervalued and anxious during what should have been an exciting time. If you’re considering KB Home (especially Somerset), get everything in writing, verify updates independently, insist on proper inspections at key stages, and be prepared for potential delays/miscommunications. We wish we had known these red flags earlier.

title: Michele and both Jeff’s were great throughout the entire process!
review_text: We recently closed on our new KB Home, and overall, we're thrilled with the process and the final product. From start to finish, the team made what could have been a stressful experience feel manageable and even exciting. Our sales rep, Michele, was outstanding. She was incredibly knowledgeable about the floor plans, upgrades, and community details right from our first visit to the model home. Michele took the time to listen to our needs and walked us through every option without pushing unnecessary add-ons, and was super responsive via text and email—even on weekends when we had randomquestions about financing or timelines. Her professionalism and patience really stood out, especially compared to some other builders we'd looked at. Once we were under contract, Jeff, our construction superintendent, was always available to answer site-specific questions, like plumbing placement or exterior finishes, and he addressed a couple of minor concerns during walkthroughs quickly and without hassle. His attention to detail showed in the final quality—everything from framing to drywall to final touches looked solid and well-done. The home was delivered on time, and the punch list items were handled promptly before closing. The house itself is well-built, energy-efficient, and feels like great value for the price. We've had no major issues post-move-in, and the warranty team has been responsive so far. Our experience with KB Homes was positive thanks to great people like Michele and Jeff. We'd definitely recommend KB Home and would work with this team again! Thank you, Michele and Jeff—you made this a smooth, enjoyable journey!

His unprofessionalism nearly cost us our closing date and added an immense amount of unnecessary anxiety to the process. I would recommend the builder but strongly caution everyone to secure outside financing and avoid the in-house lending services at all costs.

title: First Time Homebuyer - Great Experience
review_text: I will tell you as first time homebuyers in a new city, we were very weary of a scammy homebuyer so we did our due diligence, read as much of every contract as we could, depended on our realtor and friends/family a lot for advice, really put a lot of time into making sure we knew what was going on and that we wouldn’t end up with a mess on our hands. With that said, KB Home made our first home buying process so great and dare I say, even easy. They helped guide us through in a way that felt genuine and honest and explained next steps clearly, Marla our KB agent was great. And the home weended up with is top notch and as far as we can see and feel in our first 2 months, good craftsmanship and solid construction thanks to Nik who was very detailed on his walk throughs (PDO and NHO) and clearly managed the construction well. Since their formula depends on upgrades, it feels nice you can customize a lot unlike other home builders, but the downside is you feel occasionally they are nickel and diming you on every little thing with design options. As long as you’re clear on what you want and what is fluff, you find out what may be more expensive to do later, and you do pros and cons lists and understand that the model home will show you the most expensive stuff, you can end up with designs you want within your overall budget. We ended up under our max budget for the home but got all our design musts. Being decisive and having a vision at the design studio helps a lot, and Rachel was superhelpful with advice and opinion without acting like a car salesperson. We saw some indecisive homebuyers with no vision at the studio and they looked like they were suffering. Finally, the loan process was our biggest fear because that’s all the money stuff. This is the biggest thing we have ever invested in our lives. James and our realtor made the process easy, he was always available and ready to answer our questions. And he seemed transparent and helpful. And I have to shout out the First American title person who got us through the signing of all documents, she was very explanatory and helpful as well. Overall, although I always hear mixed reviews about KB Home in various cities, here in Vegas I think they are such a great choice. We were not going into one of their fancy or flagship communities like Inspirada (that’s the one I kept hearing people were moving to at least when talking to other buyers at the design studio), we were going into a community that they probably could have just given half service to and not cared about but it didn’t feel that way. Can’t recommend them enough in the Las Vegas area!

title: A Positive New Construction Experience with KB Home
review_text: My wife and I recently completed the process of buying a new construction home from KB Home, and we couldn't be happier with our decision. From our first visit to the model home to the day we received our keys, the entire journey was well-managed and transparent. The Sales & Design Process What initially drew us to KB Home was their focus on customization. We had heard horror stories from friends who felt locked into a pre-selected plan with other builders, but KB Home's Design Studio was a game-changer. Our sales consultant Jacob was incredibly knowledgeable and patient, helping usselect a floor plan that perfectly fit our needs. The design studio experience itself was a highlight. We were able to personalize everything from the flooring and countertops to the cabinet hardware and light fixtures. While we were careful with our budget, the staff guided us toward smart, impactful upgrades without any pressure. We really appreciated having so many options to make the home feel uniquely ours. The Build and Communication Once construction began, communication was excellent. Our project manager, Jodie, was a true professional. They provided us with regular updates, often including photos, which was especially helpful since we couldn't visit the site every day. Any minor questions or concerns we had were addressed promptly, and we felt like we were a genuine part of the process. The build itself went smoothly, and the team was proactive in addressing any potential issues. We were impressed with their attention to detail during the walkthroughs, where they pointed out things we might have otherwise missed. The quality of the finished home exceeded our expectations, with everything from the paint to the appliances installed with care. Post-Closing and Warranty Moving into a new home can be daunting, but the post-closing support from KB Home's customer service team was fantastic. We had a few minor warranty items come up in the first month, which is completely normal for a new house as it settles. When we submitted our claims, the warranty staff was responsive and efficient, scheduling tradespeople to come out and make the repairs in a timely manner. They really stand behind their work. Final Thoughts Overall, our experience with KB Home was exceptionally positive. The combination of a highly customizable design process, professional and transparent communication, and solid post-sale support made us feel confident and happy with our purchase. We would highly recommend KB Home to anyone looking for a new construction house, especially first-time homebuyers who want a builder that will guide them every step of the way.

review_text: Our homebuying experience with KB Homes was great! After my wife and I (with the help of our realtor) found Mustang Ridge in Magnolia, TX, the sales agent (Don) helped us select the perfect house and the best lot location for it. After providing earnest money, the KB Home construction team (managed first by Michael, then John) began immediately to build the home of our dreams. They kept us regularly updated and fully informed on the steady progress of the construction process. They answered every question and addressed every concern as things developed. At several times duringconstruction, there was uncertainty about having available utilities when they would be needed. This was quite out of the control of KB Homes, but their perseverance with the utility companies, as well as a strong dedication by the construction manager to meeting KB's deadlines, actually resulted in better performance by the utilitity companies and improved service for the whole subdivision. Despite some unavoidable delays (bad weather, supply-chain issues, permit approvals, etc.), the construction was completed within a week of the original estimate. After construction was completed, John acted without delay to correct all concerns that were identified. By the time we closed on the new home, everything had been finished to our satisfaction. My wife and I are extremely delighted with our KB Home. We smile with delight everyday as we enjoy our lives in our new home!

title: Great experience, start to finish
review_text: My wife and I bought a home from KB Homes at Gladden Farms. The whole experience could not have been more positive. For starters Chris at the sales office was courteous, professional and responsive to all our questions before we went ahead with the purchase. The house was not yet built when we committed to purchase it, and communications with both Chris and Tyler (the construction manager) was both constant and informative throughout the entire process. We also met via phone with the design team to make some upgrade selections and this too went without a hitch. In fact we were in Europe forover 2 months during construction, and during this time Tyler and Chris communicated with us every week with both pictures and the status of construction. Once back in the States we communicated via phone and more pictures, and even did our first "walk-through" via video conference with Tyler narrating as we viewed the house from Colorado. A week before closing we met with Michelle, who went over every detail of the house and made sure everything was ready before our final move in. Overall I cannot say enough about Chris, Tyler, the design team, Michelle, and even the title company. In this day and age when customer service is practically non-existent, it is good to know it is alive and well at KB Homes/Gladden Farms. Highly recommended.

title: Disappointed in premium countertop upgrade
review_text: We were extremely disappointed in our countertop upgrade. We paid a VERY high premium upgrading from granite to quartz. We mentioned our desire for a one piece top. It ended up being 2 pieces with a visible line down the middle. It was never disclosed to us this would happen. We would not have paid to upgrade if so. Especially the design we chose-it ends up being so visible. We would have picked a different design or paid zero extra and kept the granite offered and upgraded ourselves later. In addition, you can see permanent smudge spots all over it, like it had a poor job during the sealantfinishing. So it basically always looks smudged. The sun glare hits it so it is very visible. One of the backsplash pieces was cut too short as well, so there is this squishy goo filler used to fill in the space to the top of hood, which is not very premium looking. Another thing, the fridge space was only 35 inches wide, most fridges require at least 36 inches for a decent sized fridge-so we were very limited in our fridge selection (another house in same development had 36inch width). There is also a non-disclosure of a water pump instead of a pressure regulator. The garage door perimeter weather seals do not seal nicely. The outside water gutters blocks the nice tile esthetics of the front entryway-although they were nice enough to help shift it a bit to make it better-but still, the original design choice was odd.

title: Dynamic TRIO
review_text: What a wonderful experience to be a KB Homeowner. Thank you to D'Ann, Ruben, and Jason. D'Ann is the epitome of exceptional customer service. From the moment we signed our contract to the time we got the keys in our hands, D'Ann was responsive and helpful with questions we had throughout the process. We loved that she provided weekly updates toward the end of the project. We appreciate every one of these efforts! The best part is that she did this with such a heartwarming contagious laugh and smile. Ruben was our SUP throughout our build; our interactions with him were near the end ofour new build. He was patient as we walked through our NOO - New Owner Orientation. He was helpful, he understood as a homeowner what we were going through. He took the time to provide any clarities and address concerns that we had. As someone representing KB Homes, he was not shortcomings nor rushed us and put our concerns aside. We have heard horror stories about other SUPs and are so thankful we had Ruben. Jason was our saint. We had an issue with our sink caused by a third party a week after we moved in. We elevated it, and Jason took immediate action to address it. I can't express enough our gratitude and appreciation for this grand effort. This is our first experience with KB Homes. D'Ann, Ruben, and Jason have set the bar high with their exceptional customer service, which I think would be hard-pressed for another builder team to follow. Thank you to this TRIO for setting a benchmark expectation that exemplified a 5-star rating.

title: First Time Home Buyer
review_text: Scott (Sales Person) was amazing during the whole buying process. He was responsive at all times and days. He ensured to look into any questions I had and provide a timely response or forward requested information. Even after the sale closed, he still ensured to stay in touch and provide support as needed, especially when I had some issues with items getting fixed at my new home. Daniel has also been of great support and resource. He, like Scott, has been responsive and timely. He's a man of his word. Very grateful for his responsiveness and commitment to making it right. He also was asounding board on the frustrations I was experiencing and continues to check in to see if I need anything or keep me posted and updated on any pending matter. I do find that at the beginning, there were several opportunities with Rudy (I sent an email to customer service that you may reference). I do see efforts in making it right. title: The product was worth the wait.
review_text: Overall, we had a positive experience. The crew at KB were unquestionably helpful and assiduous in the care and creation of their product, as well as their outstanding customer service which is superior to most companies of any stripe. The foreman and his assistant are very attentive to their customers needs and to the needs of the home. They carry themselves with a gravitas that supports their professional care and attention to their customers. I’m very impressed with Tommy and Efron. They are stand up guys. The negatives in our experience were pretty minimal. Although we had numerousdelays in the timeline of the home’s completion but it was fairly innocuous and the fault was not KB’s; allegedly they had manpower issues during the plumbing phase of the build. Additionally, there seemed to be a disconnect with information disclosure regarding the closing/move in date. We struggled with obtaining an accurate close date from their office. However, this was annulled by the fact that they were able to get us closed and into our home a week before the projected close date. We were one of the first families to move in on our end of the block! So, the outcome was very positive. Overall our experience with KB has been positive. We are pleased with the product and support team behind it.

title: Held our (new homeowners) hands throughout the process, very trustworthy and thorough.
review_text: tl;dr: Solid builder, trustworthy, no sneaky stuff, responsive, coherence among their internal teams, informative and transparent buying process. Recommended. Ours was almost an impulse buy during a very wrong time to buy a house. I am pretty happy it turned out to be an almost perfect decision. We were a lot apprehensive, at times worried, and yet Wendy, Luis, Melanie, Elke, Joe, Vanessa - they all stood by us, guided us through the maze and voila! we ended up owning our (almost) dream home after about 2 years of house-hunting. Initial Days We had been looking for almost 2 years,visited the model homes at Lotus/Lily, had lost hope when Wendy said “oh wait, there is another plan which does not have a model but I can show you a house we are building now”. We saw the unit, were impressed by it, she offered an excellent deal on a new unit and then and there itself we decided - this is it! The design process and choices were excellent, their default configurations often good enough in most cases. We were guided gently through the various steps, Wendy communicated constantly helping us avoid several long trips to the office/site. Build The build quality is exceptional of the structure, flooring, electrical, roof, painting, carpentry etc. The Cabinets and Plumbing were good as well. Timelines slipped a bit here and there due to unforeseen events, but we were kept aware of everything in advance so none of it came as a shock to us. Towards closing, I know that the team pushed hard to meet the deadlines, often going the extra mile (like working on auxiliary power when utility company delayed things). We were given the proper walkthroughs (KBHome has a published timeline plan for each house apparently) at the right times and were kept aware of the various things to be taken care of once we started living in here. Interfacing Entire KBHome team connected the dots for us, putting us properly in touch with the required external teams (Escrow, Mortgage, Insurance, County/State stuff etc.) and everyone we had interacted had the same quality of service that KBHome had! I never had to second guess a decision once we were on track. Melanie P worked closely with us and we felt like we were being helped by a close friend/family member. Similarly Christie and Hector from Shawna’s team (outside of KBHome). Move-In and Post Move-In Luis, Joseph made sure we settled in comfortably knowing there is nothing to worry about the build quality. Joe came in occasionally, we connected well and he explained all the ‘unexplained buttons and levers’ of the house. Luis had been with us throughout the process and I was often surprised by the amount of care they put into our house (they build so many - it was difficult to believe they could pay individual attention at this level). We had plumbing issues and a few paint marks and such - all were taken care immediately. Conclusion I would highly recommend KBHome to anyone without a doubt. Our friends and family are impressed by the quality and value, especially the value part.

title: Best experience when it comes to home buying
review_text: I was apprehensive when it came to selecting a new build because I’ve had family members who have purchased homes from builders and it was a nightmare for them either from the loan perspective, or the build, or the aftercare. However, the home we saw checked all of our boxes so we went for it. Starting with Renee at the sales office: absolutely phenomenal experience when it came to getting information prior to putting the deposit down and then actually securing the home. Throughout the process, Renee continued to be an exceptional source as this was our first home buying experience. Evenafter her duties were complete, Renee went above and beyond to help. Next, Blanca with the lending department: the handoff process from Renee to Blanca was seamless. Blanca worked to answer all of our questions and told us exactly what to expect. My credit had a few dings on it that I raised with her, and we partnered to address them. The horror stories that you hear of the lender being unresponsive or demanding paperwork that had already been submitted seem to be just that- stories. Blanca made everything easy and we knew exactly what was going on throughout the process. It seemed too easy if anything. Last but definitely not least, is Luis with what I’d call the aftercare team: after we moved in, there were a few things we had questions about (mostly cosmetic) that we found during the pre-closing walkthrough with Luis. Not only did Luis fix a majority of the things noticed prior to move in, but helped coordinate the items that couldn’t be remediated until after we moved in. Luis has been responsive and extremely accommodating to our needs even after we’ve moved in, and continues to be a fantastic source for questions that come up regarding the house. All in all, and absolutely amazing experience working with the KB team as a whole throughout the entire process.

title: Glenwood Team Has Provided the BEST Experiences I Have Ever Had in Real Estate Transactions
review_text: Glenwood Team Has Provided the BEST Experiences I Have Ever Had in Real Estate Transactions First of all, allow me to get right into the point by establishing my credential first since everyone here is very busy, of course, that includes myself for building my own backyard among other things as a new homeowner; I've been in the guest/customer service related industry for my entire life as a Certified Wine Sommelier and more; therefore, the "takes one to know one" part comes into place. Secondly, I've just self-published a book/menu on Amazon about guest/customer services and it earnednumber one in five different categories besides as the Most Wished For and Most Gifted book in just 18 days; so, "takes one to know one," it is! My initial experience was at Belcarra with a very experienced gentleman: Pros - very enthusiastic and knowledgeable. Cons - gave me the wrong information about the Builder's incentive to which could only apply toward options, not to lot premium or anything else, it's a "use it all or lose it." And the all-out-blitz pressure in sales' tactics was just way too much, it totally ruined the admiration I had for him. Let me just mention a few things that he "recommended." 1. Turning the standard master-bath into the one like his, which is like Bellagio's if not better, even his friends agreed, and he just went on and on about it, my realtors and I kept looking at each other while listening, sigh... 2. Upgrading the standard master bath into a Luxurious one by taking out the second bedroom, sigh... 3. Upgrading the electrical system throughout the entire house even at the cost of over $2,000, many of his buyers regretted it, he then said to them "I told you so!" sigh... Now here is the really, really good stuff, The Glenwood Team, KB Home Design Studio, Field Managers, and Loan Department. YAY!!! John was the first one I came in contact with, super friendly, professional and knowledgeable, after showing me those available lots, I went with his recommendation, and said let's write up the Sale's contract now! John passed the transaction to Lori because it was her turn, What A Team Player (I knew that it must be part of the KB policies, and yet, still). Thank you, John! Lori was just as awesome as John while writing the agreement, she thoroughly explained to me, and about what to expect and when... Thank you, Lori! Unfortunately, so I thought...John and Lori both got transferred. But, here she is, The Star of The Show, ladies and gentleman, I give you Beth...! Oh. my goodness, I felt so fortunate and grateful to have someone like her to help me through the entire process in those bi-weekly updates and more...to the point of, I even asked myself, is it Monday/Friday, yet (LOL)? Beth is the epitome and the living proof of a true professional! She is everything I mentioned about John, Lori, but plus a whole lot more...caring, thoughtful, respectful and friendly, too. Thank you, Beth! You are the BEST! The Design Studio, Lindsey is just as Amazing as Beth! Throughout the 2-3 hour appointment we had, I never felt any rush, she was very polite and thoughtful while laying down the options that would best fit my needs. Thank you, Lindsey, for turning a house into a home for me! Filed Managers, Tyler, the pre-drywall orientation was very pleasant and done in such a professional manner! Thank you, Tyler! Now The Field Manager, TAD! He is super awesome in all aspects, the first walk-through, second walk-through, and all the follow-ups after moving in. He has been taking care of all issues for me in a timely manner if not ASAP! KB Home, and all his associated Homeowners are so lucky to have him!! Thank you , Tad!!! Last but not least, the KB Home Loan team, Troy, and Chad had been so great throughout the entire process with their good cop-and-bad cop tactics (LOL). Thank you, Troy, and Chad for being so very helpful from the pre-approval to closing! I truly appreciate all your help. To conclude, I now know where and whom I would refer and buy the next home from. Well done KB for finding and building such a wonderful team. Thank you!!! Cheers! Henry, the Wine Geek

title: 2 month Builder overall experience
review_text: Overall our new home experience has been great! We are first time home buyers so for us we were always weary about the home buying process from my sister-in-law's bad experience with her home and from the experience we have heard from other home buyers, so we weren't sure what to expect. It seems like you can always find a negative review but never a good one, however KB has changed our mind to the negative responses. From the very beginning Pam from the sales office made sure we were comfortable asking questions, very knowledgeable and she was always quick with her responses since we wantedto make sure we had everything on time so we didn't delay our buying process. Hope from KB home loans was great to work with and kept us up to date on what was going on since our new home was plagued with delay after delay but with every new build this was expected and she made sure we were taken care of. With all of this said and done I have been extremely impressed by the construction manager Robert. He was always accommodating when I had to reschedule our home walk throughs and he was definitely hands on when it came to the home building process. He was always timely and kept giving us updates on the progress of the home while it was being built. This was great for us since there were times where we wondered what was going on. If there was anything that needed to be fixed before we moved in he made sure it was completed and he definitely cares about customers since they are spending a large amount of money on a new home.

review_text: Would like to start by saying, "Thank You" (or "Mahalo!!!") to the whole KB Home team that made this happen. We can't forget Melissa (KB Sales Rep) who also stepped in to help and answered our questions when Jeffery was out. The best process of it all was atthe KB Design Studio where Lindsay was very helpful in helping us design our home with all the product selection we had to go through. Then came the closing...and Jackie was very helpful setting up a remote notary while we signed our closing documents in Hawaii. And the most exciting part of it all was the final move in. KB Home was a prefect build, could not ask for anything better. Devin (Project Manager) was extremely helpful after our move-in. Helping us get situated and answered all the questions we had and took care of the issues we occurred during our move-in. Devin has always been there to help out. We're still not done settling in our new home, since we are still in the process of moving but the experience we have with the entire KB Home Team is the best you could ever asked for. KB Home is the way to go!

review_text: Outstanding experience with KB Home Team for new home build (1455 sq ft) from site selection (just a dirt lot) through build complete ready move-in (8 months). The design studio (customizations and/or add-ons, in my case, patio, 9' ceilings, electric car charger pre-wire, ceiling lights & pre-wire ceiling fans every room, 7 in 1 surround pre-wired, custom kitchen cabinets & tile, bathroom appliances & customization to shower & tub, carpet, stair railings, bedroom to loft conversion, appliances microwave with air fryer & convection oven built in, wash/dry, oven with air fry, keypad door lock)is the best attribute. You can see them all before you lock in. After move in, some minor issues with appliances resolved same or next day. Throughout cycle, constant (weekly photo updates) on home build process. Questions sent to actual builder and KB Home realtor answered immediate throughout the process, and after move-in.

title: I would like to make a special thank you to ALL of KB's Employees who were a part of my home buying experience each and everyone had a special role and made this first time home buyer experience the best one! Hands down the greatest experience.
review_text: How did you feel about the entire process, from initial purchase to final move-in? My Overall Impression of buying a home with KB is exceptional. I can't express in words the gratitude I have for each one of the professionals who were a part in mine and my family's journey of buying a home. From the initial experience of looking at models and seeing that KB was the one for us, to the very last minute of receiving our keys and walking into our new home, the total experience was incredible. It was mine and my spouses first time buying a home, therefore we had a million questions, concernsand inquiries never once did we feel that our concerns were never acknowledged. EVERY-TIME we had a question the person for the task was always available and knowledgeable, answered all of our questions professionally, accurately, and empathetic. I can honestly say that I am incredibly grateful to have picked KB for this entire experience. How would you describe the quality and value of your new home? In minimal words I would describe the quality of my new home as valuable and expensive. The quality surpassed my expectations. My only complaint would be that unfortunately in the spaces inside Home where the builders call "wet spaces" it is the only areas that are painted in semi-gloss. The entire rest of the house is painted in flat paint which is incredibly easy to get dirty, any little smear of a finger print is noticeable and extremely hard to clean. How was your experience with the builder’s team? Did they do what they promised? Did they respond to you in a timely fashion? The over all experience with the builder team was a good one, the time frame they gave to me was accurate. My family and I were able to plan our move timely and accordingly which was great due to the process I'd waiting for a new home to be build from floor up. I thought it was especially exceptional that we received weekly and monthly updates. Pictures and positive thoughts. What would you most like potential home buyers to know about this builder? KB is nothing more than the best. They make you feel like family and they show how much they care about you and your entire experience in home buying, that to me is priceless. You can't teach someone to be compassionate, friendly and tender. All traits of which every individual who was part of our journey had. Again, thank you to all of KB's professionals!! From my family to yours we appreciate each one of you! You all ROCK!

title: Quality Truly Is A Top Priority
review_text: We moved from Michigan to Colorado while our house was in the very early stages of construction. Our salesman and the two construction superintendents were helpful and accommodating during the build process. For obvious safety reasons, we followed guidelines regarding visitations to our home construction site carefully while making a frequent number of visits during the construction period. This had nothing to do with any trust concerns regarding kb Home. It was the way I was raised by parents and grandparents imparting to me how best to ensure a successful outcome wether the buildingproject has residential or commercial. This build was for our “age in place” primary residence, We were very particular about the final product being what we expected. While virtually all building construction, especially residential homes, have a followup “punch list” of last things to complete even after possession, the kb Home process is extremely thorough! Communication before and after possession has been superlative. If you are considering builders, particularly residential, I highly recommend you consider kb Home as your builder of choice.

review_text: Being first-time home builders (not buyers), we were impressed with the amount of say we had when it came to customizing our home compared to other builders in the area. We didn't feel like just another contract to them, but that was largely due to the fantastic sales team we worked with, specifically Julie B.. Her initial greeting was warm and welcoming, no pressure to buy, and answered any and all of our MANY questions that we had along the way. She was available any time andwas our advocate when we needed her. Without her, we wouldn't have purchased a home through KB. When Julie wasn't in the office, her counterpart Michelle K. was equally as welcoming and warm, and helped us build the home of our dreams. Thomas Z. was our super and also without him, we would not have been as satisfied with how things turned out. I have recommended KB to friends and co-workers based on our experience, and will continue to do so.

title: Large developer housing done right
review_text: Frame of reference - rated as a large scale, tract home developer. Basic construction quality in our development is excellent. YMMV, depending on state/region. Base finishes/appliances are what you would expect, but the design studio is a very valuable feature of the process, where you add options, and has a good number of choices. Expect to budget at least 50K though, if you want to upgrade to better quality components. If you are going to go higher end, additional 80-100K should be planned. As you would expect, there is not a lot of flexibility in the build process outside of providedoptions for elevations, paint color scheme, etc., but there is a good amount of flexibility in the choices available for furnishing through the studio. All staff we interacted with during build and mortgage process were easy to work with and professional. Post-possession, customer service has been highly responsive and generally quite helpful. Overall, especially in our market (Metro Seattle), we feel that our home represents a very good value for the cost per square foot.

title: Couldn't have asked for a better team
review_text: I would highly recommend the sales and building team at KB Homes to anyone looking to buy a new home. From the initial sales consultation to the final walk-through, the team was always responsive and helpful. They took the time to understand our needs and concerns, and they worked with us to create a home that exceeded our expectations. The construction process was smooth and efficient, and the team was always available to answer our questions or address any concerns even after the home was finished. We are so happy with our new home, and we would not have been able to achieve this withoutthe help of the KB team. Here are some specific examples of how the team went above and beyond: Our sales representatives, Janice and Tammy, were incredibly knowledgeable about the home building/buying process and were always available to answer our questions. They were patient and understanding, even when we were unsure about certain details. The design center team, specifically Jennifer, was helpful in providing honest suggestions when selecting features for our home. She was able to provide us with options that fit our budget and style that minimized post-close work. The construction manager, Michael, was always available to answer our questions and address any concerns. He was proactive in keeping us updated on the progress of our home and made sure that we were happy with the final product. After moving into the home, he continues to check in on us to make sure every little detail is perfect. We would not hesitate to recommend KB Homes to anyone looking to buy a new home. The team is professional, knowledgeable, and dedicated to providing their clients with the best possible experience.

The biggest difference was the communication I had with the team of individuals working for KB Home and assisting me throughout the process. Jackie, Paul, Desiree, Jake, Victoria, and Shelbi were so helpful and consistent in communicating with me weekly. If questions arose, I could easily text or emailthem and they were quick in responding. Even after purchasing my home and moving in, I still am in contact with Jackie, Jake, and Shelbi - they have become like family, patient with me and answering questions along the way. Building with KB Home is building with family.

Upon completion they had follow through and showed me all of my home features, and all of theresources could need if there was an issue (there hasn’t been one yet). Still, months after I’ve moved in, I get regular check ups to make sure everything in my home is up to my satisfaction. It’s a great feeling to know that I have a staff of employees and a company on my side in this endeavor and I’m happy I went with KB and got my home. title: Stephen C., Superintendent
review_text: Obviously, the building delays have created a myriad problems that are beyond anybody's control. This is my second KB Home. I will have to give a big shout-out to Stephen. On the ball, helpful, understanding, and just a real caring person. This example will say it best. Probably four weeks after closing, Stephen was just driving by, and I waved at him, and he waved back. I was just saying hello. A couple of hours later we noticed the light at the top of the stairwell had come loose. Stephen cared enough to notice and called back, thinking I might have been flagging him down. I told him I wasjust saying hey but noticed the light situation. AT 7:30 PM AT NIGHT, his reply was, "I am out by your driveway, and I have my 16 ft ladder. Let me come in and fix that real quick if you are available." In my experience, as a business owner and martial arts instructor for over 20 years, YOU CANNOT TEACH THAT. Especially in today's times. Also, Steven R (sales) is the major reason we were even considering another KB Home. He has become a family friend.

title: Outstanding
review_text: The excellent experience I had working with KB Home began the day I decided to stop by just to take a look at the models. With no pressure from the sales agent, I decided to prequalify through KB Home Loans, and put money down on a spec home that had already started being built. Watching the build was great fun! Since my home was a spec home, all of the features were pre-chosen. The Design Studio still met with me so I could see everything- tile, cabinets, carpet etc.. All were gorgeous! I enjoyed working with the builders, the construction Superintendent, and staff. The Super is a reallygreat guy, who has very high standards and expects the same from his crew, and outside contractors. He kept the build moving forward, with few delays due to availability of materials. I watched the entire build, from concrete to finish, visiting often. I was able to see the quality and attention to detail with each step. Not only does KB offer financial services, I was also able to buy a home owner's insurance policy through the company, which cost half of what I'd pay through my regular provider, and with more coverage. Because I chose KBHS Home Loans for my mortgage, KB and KBHS covered some of the closing costs. This was a huge help, and part of why I decided to go with a new build. I have had regular check-ins from KB Home Customer Service, since moving in. They are handling the details to ensure everything that is warranty related is taken care of. Overall, the experience of buying and building a home with KB Home was amazing! This is a spectacular company, and I have felt like nothing less than the most important client with each step. I would do it all again.

title: Exceptional Customer Service
review_text: The customer service was exceptional, from day 1 (touring models) to the final walkthrough, the communication and service has been amazing. I have never had guess at the progress of my construction, the super intendent always kept me informed. The same goes with the financial aspect as well, I was always informed of my status and expectations needed to progress. After taking possession of my new home (6 weeks later), I unfortunately had a problem with the outside lighting (no fault of KB) the timer reset itself. I couldn't figure out what was wrong, by a run of luck I ran into Ramone whoasked how things were going. After I mentioned the problem, he stopped everything he was doing and came by my place to fix the problem. This type of service is what stands out, at that point KB really didn't have an obligation to help but they were more than happy to. I am more than happy with my purchase, and I am completely satisfied with the craftmanship of the house.

review_text: I had a great experience with the purchase of my home. The people here are awesome and truly care about you. They called weekly to give me updates on my home as it was being built. When they realized that my flooring was going to be delayed, they called to let me know and I had a chance to go back to the design center to pick out more flooring. Speaking of the design center, they are awesome!! Very knowledgeable and friendly as well. Love that I could get my refrigerator, washer and dryer put in my home before I moved in. I think the price of my home was on point, the options that areavailable are on point, and the quality of my home is on point. Once you are in your home, they will do a 30 day, check in to see if there is anything that needs to be done. If so, they are on it and will make sure it is corrected and make sure you are satisfied with the work. What builder cares that much about their homebuyers to make sure that everything is just right for you? I will buy my second home with KB again.

review_text: I will say this from my title you can tell my experience was great with the individual departments above. However from the building process and dealing with the building superintendent that was my less desirable experience. KB needs to perform an overall of their building superintendent department and provide proper training. Building superintendents are suppose to be project managers and should be able tell customers exactly what’s going on with their home during the process. It took my house 11 1/2 months to be completed and that time included the closing date being pushed back 2 times. Iunderstand COVID slowed things down but as a buyer things could’ve been handled better. And let’s be clear I was not one of those customers that was hard to deal with. I actually was very accommodating until my limit had been reached. I wish I could included individual names but the departments above from my title thank so much for everything and I wish each of you the best in the future.

title: Building a home... the way it should be!
review_text: The KB Home team made this experience enjoyable and as stress free as possible. While visiting the Orlando area in July 2019, from Hawaii, we looked at KB Home and several other builders in the entire metropolitan area. KB Home and Maronda Homes were our top picks. In October, 2020 we returned to Florida and selected KB Home as our builder. After a walk through of the model coupled with a quite informative and professional presentation, we was sold on a home in Sawgrass Bay. The entire staff - sales, design upgrades, our construction superintendent and finance, all made the process onefor the books and have raised the bar for those attempting to provide great customer service! Knowledgeable, professional and proactive... dedicated to ensuring our needs and wants were exceeded. We gladly give KB Home a 5 star rating, without hesitation or reservation!

title: A True Team Approach in Action
review_text: Part 1 of 2 Back in July of 2020, my wife and I departed from Michigan having just sold our home of 23 years. We arrived in central Texas without a place to live or a job lined up. We made the 1,500-mile cross-country move ourselves, loading and driving a 26-foot rented truck not once, but twice. We also needed to fly back to Michigan twice, all of this during the scourge of the COVID-19 pandemic. With two storage units full of our belongings, and living at a local extended-stay hotel, we ventured out to scout various developments across the New Braunfels, Texas region. Fortunately, we haddone extensive real estate research, both online (for months) and in person, during our first voyage to Texas. As a result of our diligent research, we arrived back in Texas holding a very favorable impression of KB Home. That, in turn, allowed us to focus in more closely on particular communities. We actually came across Deer Crest in a serendipitous manner, as we recognized the now-familiar KB Home logo and signage on our way to visit another development. We pulled in to tour and review the model homes onsite. We met Marvin...and the rest is history. Marvin was our Sales Counselor but — in reality — his role would be better described as a Counselor. That’s because the KB Home product sells itself through a combination of impeccable workmanship, resourceful design, creative space utilization, quality materials, and an attractive value-to-price quotient. Marvin was professional and well-informed, able to answer all our questions. Yet, at the same time, he was friendly, accessible, engaging, and motivated to guide and assist us. We loved the model homes on display and it was not long before we were narrowing down our decision to a handful of specific floor plans. We developed an excellent rapport with Marvin due to his easy-going nature and manner of never applying any undue pressure. We genuinely cultured a friendship with him and our mutual trust grew from there. After 3 days, we had decided on a specific floor plan and we wrote out a deposit check. Since we were new to the area, we had several pressing questions and concerns about the ongoing process and timing of events. After all, I did not arrive in Texas with a job. We discussed our options with Marvin, who relayed our financial information, assets, and resources to the KB Home lending group. Within less than a week from our first meeting with Marvin, we were approved and signed our purchase agreement. We were the second buyers in the brand new Deer Crest community we now call home. With the comfort in knowing that we had secured our selected lot, we were able to leave the country to attend to the rapidly-declining health of a loved one. Marvin had described the time line for making our selections with the Design Studio, and then highlighted the important target dates for the various phases of construction. Before leaving, we had an opportunity to meet with Brett, the Project Manager, and Joey, the Superintendent. Both men were instrumental in communicating and reinforcing the “Community Team” concept that KB Home has developed and readily stands by. Brett and Joey effectively put our minds at ease, as we navigated what was the first brand-new construction home buying process in our life. Processing a completely different experience from purchasing an existing home off the market, we were teeming with questions and concerns. Our case was completely unique, as our loved one’s medical issues necessitated our being out of the country for stretches of months at a time. As primary caregivers, we could not just drop and run from our responsibilities, and we depended heavily upon not only a great team approach, but also a reliable liaison and consistent flow of information and updates from the KB Home group back in the U.S. At our construction orientation meeting Brett and Joey picked up on Marvin’s efforts, outlining the various phases of construction, and the process of walk-throughs and stage approvals along the way. All of our questions were answered and we were completely satisfied with the clearly laid out plan moving forward. While outside the U.S., we traveled between two locations. Throughout our journeys, the entire KB Homes team stayed in constant contact via text messages, email, and phone calls. We took a long time contemplating and considering our design options and additional selections and modifications to our basic floor plan. Working with us from the Design Studio was Shannon. She exhibited tremendous patience with our seemingly endless changes of opinion. Shannon worked tirelessly to accommodate our needs while assisting us with our budgetary considerations. Between the pandemic and our being out of the country, we had to conduct all our meetings online. Shannon provided us with all the information we could ask for, including design option guide books, images, the website tools, and comparative summaries of various design directions we could take. She even scheduled an additional online conference so that we felt completely comfortable with our understanding of the enticing array of choices and a detailed pricing breakdown of all of our selections and design options. We actually had to contend with three hurricanes in less than a month’s time. Despite these issues and a lengthy power outage, Shannon worked through the challenges. We returned to the U.S. to meet with Shannon in person at the Design Studio. This gave us an opportunity to see and physically touch the various materials we selected and make any final modifications. We signed our options contract in late November. Although nearly four months had passed since we signed our purchase agreement, the KB Home team was always patient with us, assuring us that our complete satisfaction was their ultimate goal.

title: KB Home - A sales representative was very nice to answer my questions about
review_text: A sales representative was very nice to answer my questions about KB Home, promptly informed us the progress of home building. I decided to buy a home from KB Home since price versus location and environment are good. Design studio experience were very good. He guided me every option in detail, explained the advantage and disadvantage kindly. So, I could choose the options that I needed while doing design selection meeting. They sent information every week by asking what we needed. They answered in detail and supported us regarding mortgage interest rate and helped us to adjust it very kindlyand informatively. I was 100% satisfied with their supports. In every steps of building, the construction manager explained about progresses in weekly private meeting along with email and conference call meeting. especially, they carefully construct foundations with concrete with very good temperature at the time. Build manager checked very carefully if there were missing parts in every step and fixed it in right time. construction steps were done in timely manner. final tough-up was very good by checking every missing or defect parts. after closing, every broken part was touched by construction manager promptly. Thanks KB Home for building my new home. Home was ready 100% in every aspect, especially in air conditioning, waters, and so on. it was almost perfect. I am satisfied with warranty care staff. They fixed items that I asked by well-planned manner. usually, they were fixed 2 days in average. This measure was eliminating the delay because of my out of town plan. In overall, KB Home gives me a nice impression, especially in diligent building activities even in COVID-19 period. Building was done in time with good quality, especially in energy efficiency. The HERS® or Home Energy Rating System reported my home is 55 rating, which is lower the better. In average, new home's HERS score is 130.

review_text: The customer service from Bryon and Rob was great. In terms of improvement for KB Home, I think better attention to the small details would be nice. For example, we found a few paint drippings on the carpet, counters, and doorknobs. Also the AC unit wasn't level. Other than that, I think our experience with KB Home was good.

title: Trusworthiness
review_text: As a first time home buyer, l was really scared to venture into the process considering everything negative l have heard from others. However, my experience with KB home was surprisingly great. When we started, l realized the process was well thought and organized. I was told that someone will contact me weekly to give the progress information and they actually did. I know everything that's going on with my new home because James, the biulder called me every Friday and so were the contacts from Doug the sales manager. I love the fact that l went to their studio to pick out every details andl remembered how comfortable l was with the designer. I wasn't pressured to choose any design that l wasn't comfortable with. Rather, l was being assisted to make even better choice. And the finishing of my house is amazing. The loan process wasn't bad as well. Luis was the loan officer. I benefited from his great experience and when l got nervous about the closing date towards the end, he ensured that all the necessities were in place in time to close as soon as possible. Overall, l will recommend KB Homes to new buyers simply because the experience is less stressful and you have a choice on how your home is designed. You look at your home and you are comfortable with everything in it because you pick out most of them. It's such a great feeling!

title: Exceptional Customer Experience
review_text: I have purchased 6 homes, 3 of which were new construction and this experience went far beyond anything I've ever experienced. First, my sales person, Kevin, was phenomenal. He was charismatic, attentive and went over and above without being pushy. He sent weekly updates with pictures during the build and followed up after move-in to let me know he was still there if needed. The design process was terrific too with an extremely knowledgeable and helpful designer who also didn't push for more expensive options, but provided all info for me to decide. And the construction team was terrific aswell with touchpoints during the build. The frame walk was one I never experienced as every intricate detail was explained. Any issues that needed repair were immediately handled and always very friendly and responsive. I would recommend KB to everyone as I have finally found my forever home!

title: KB Home- Dream Team Experience
review_text: My lack of experience or knowledge did not matter as a first time home buyer. This KB Team was an absolute dream come true. Being very patient, kind, and trustworthy, and giving me assistance and feedback every step of the way. When something needed adjusting or fixing, the team Jose led was exceptionally quick to make sure things were as I requested or ordered. Alex in the design team was so easy and knowledgable to work alongside. The Construction Managers were equally exceptional to work with as well. When special cupboard door handles went out of stock, one manager was quick tospecial order the item for my home from E-bay himself. When I thought the plants were too high maintenance, Jose personally chose new plants for me, and planted them himself. Jeff made sure what wasn't done by my final walk through was taken care of by closing. Jose's presence throughout my first home buying experience was reassuring, and filled with integrity. Each person of my team from KB has exceptional integrity and made my dream of buying a home so easy and come true. I have a beautiful new home with many thanks to each one. I am so grateful for each one of you! I have been truly very blessed to know each one of you. (Oh, and I can't forget the construction crews either! They worked long days and nights, even on weekends to finish my home, as well as others.)

title: Wonderful Employees
review_text: I am a first-time buyer and the home-buying experience can be overwhelming, frustrating, and frightening. However, the employees working for this company are outstanding and extremely trustworthy. They assuaged my uncertainties, and now I am blessed with a beautiful house. ***Sarah Jensen (Sales Consultant): She made the home buying experience easy. She kept me well informed throughout the process and she is extremely knowledgeable and trustworthy. She is super friendly and the only sales consultant that I ever felt comfortable with when considering buying a home. ***Roger Sewell (Sr.Construction Manager): Extremely knowledgeable and trustworthy. He kept me well informed throughout the process with weekly updates. He took his time in the walk-throughs and thoroughly explained everything. He was accessible and answered all my questions. In addition, he quickly resolved minor issues. ***Rick Moruzzi (Sr. Customer Service Representative): Another accessible and trustworthy employee that quickly resolved any issues, answered questions and is extremely helpful. ***Sylma Rojas (Mortgage Loan Originator): Extremely knowledgeable and trustworthy. She kept me well informed throughout the home-buying process. She was extremely accessible even on her days off. Additionally, she has contacted me several times after closing just to make sure my family and I are doing well and happy with our purchase. Overall, it was a great home-buying experience and I appreciate that all these employees communicated with me in-person, via cellphone, and through emails. It made my experience genuine with human interaction. Thank you!

title: Overall excellent experience
review_text: If you had asked me if I were to be a KB home owner five years ago, I would have said you're joking. It seems KB Home has performed a complete 180, possibly by hiring new blood, but the upgrades and overall experience was as best as one would hope, especially being a new home buyer. Weekly updates by our agent Josh, was nothing short of impressive. To see our home progress week-by-week was quite the experience and added to our overall excitement in moving into our new home. Even though my wife and I visited the design studio 5-6 times, the staff (Allison) was absolutely the most patient andfriendly person we'd run across in our entire KB Home experience. My wife was previously a home stager and designer from the bay area, so meeting her vision was something Allison had no issue assisting with. I was utterly impressed by the craftsmanship of the home in each of it's stages, especially when we did the initial walkthrough pre-drywall. It was impressive to see how fast the home was being built, with out issue. During the loan/underwriter phase, I was not feeling 100% with the communication between the lender and myself. It would have been better to be aware of all of the needed documentation at the beginning, rather near the end. As the process seemed extremely rushed and caused my wife and I to feel a bit stressed about ensuring we'd meet the escrow guidelines and title dates. The two lenders, Marcus and Scott were good, but the underwriting experience was pretty horrible, but didn't phase my overall 5-star rating, though please look into polishing up some of the processes leading to the underwriter phase. After move-in/construction complete, we did find a number of discrepancies, including some that weren't addressed such as the doors not fully closing due to the alignment of the knob and bolt. Rather than having someone come out, I decided to repair it myself. It seemed as though the speed in which the house was built did leave a little bit of quality out of play. Aside from the expected paint issues, there were a small number of issues that could have been prevented if the installer would have double checked their work. The KB representatives after move-in have been extremely helpful, even though I feel the issues should have been caught/repaired prior to move-in. I would recommend KB to anyone, especially due to the upgrade options. My wife and I spent about 80k worth in upgrades, which has helped us create our dream home (only wishing we had a 3-car garage option).

title: KB Home - Options available are great!
review_text: Options available are great! If you are a visual person like me, make sure you ask questions about them and have a clear understanding of the options that you are seeing in the model homes so that when you are selecting the options for your home that you get the ones that you really want. Questions to ask: Is this option (from the model) offered in the home we have chosen? Are there any differences in the option from what we see in the model to that which will be placed/built in our home? How does the model differ from the paper layout of the house in the brochures? title: Very Satisfied with Our New KB Home
review_text: We have been searching for the perfect home to downsize, and have been looking for the right property for well over a year that had a number of amenities we wanted. View, private yard, single story, location, etc...On our way to sign a purchase agreement with another builder, we happened to take the road less travelled and saw a new development and stopped by. The first model we entered had both of us smiling. It was exactly what we had been looking for. Single story, large inviting great room, accordion door option, outdoor living option, and the perfect floor plan for us. Checking with Jeffin the sales office, there were a couple of available lots with privacy and views. Needless to say we found the ideal lot. That was just the beginning of our journey with KB Homes. While we had heard some negative things about the company a number of years ago (under different leadership), we took a chance. Needless to say we have had one of the best home buying experiences ever. Every step of the way we met with amazing representatives. From the initial sales team, the interior design team, the construction super, and the post move-in team have been nothing short of exemplary. The home was built with care and with all the tech-modern enhancements. I have even walked the entire house with a lit candle to see if any leaks/drafts around windows, doors, etc. and it's bullet proof. The monthly savings of an energy efficient home was important to us, and by our calculations we will save well over 15k a year (yes, seriously!) over our last home. Upon move-in we found a couple minor paint issues that were resolved in a few days (they gave us the can of paint if we ever need it in the future)...All in all we are completely satisfied with our decision and look forward to many years living here.

title: Happy with everything.
review_text: I watched this house being built like a hawk, and I have to tell you that every little thing I found wrong, was fixed or in the process of being fixed by the time I would mention it. Tony was very detail oriented and addressed all our concerns, also our sales rep would send us weekly pictures of the house as it was being built. This is our second KB home and it seems they only got better with the second house. They used radiant barrier sheathing all over the house instead of just in the attic. The brick work was a lot fancier than our first house with arches in the entry way. They alsodesigned the house so that the water heater in the garage was recessed into the wall instead of taking up a corner. The corners of the drywall as rounded and look alot nicer than the square ones in our old home. Zero issues with plumbing, HVAC or electrical.

title: A Very Modern Electronics Home
review_text: We looked at all the new homes in the areas and cities surrounding where we wanted to move, and found KB Homes the BEST quality standard builder by far. From the loan process to moving in, they worked with us, and our needs and budget. We loved that we could go to the design center and pick out so many items and "customize" the interior of our home! The design team was wonderful to work with! We upgraded almost everything as we wanted to have our new home ready when we moved in. (Do upgrade your medicine cabinets . . . the standard ones are very cheap.) The follow-up after we moved in wasamazing and much better than we've had with other new home builder companies! Everything we upgraded has been exceptional quality and workmanship! We love the upgraded sensor light switches, outdoor lights and bathroom fans. And the tankless water heater saves so much time and water! (But increasing the water temp. can be interesting.) The only things we have had a few problems with have been a couple of the standard items we didn't upgrade. Our main problem was the thermostat. We couldn't get it to work no matter what we did! KB Homes graciously agreed to replace the one that comes standard with the home for one we like and reimburse us for the cost! You can't get better than that! Overall, we would definitely recommend KB Homes if you're going to move in to a newly built home.

Since then we have been working with Zachary on any warenty issue (small little things here and there) and he has been extremely attentive and quick to get the issuesresolved immediately. We cannot stress how thankful we are for these great people and for our beautiful new home.

title: our building experience was fun, stress free and very rewarding
review_text: The hardest part of the entire experience was taking the trip to the sales office at The Villages at Prairie Center. Believing that we could make the happen was the toughest part. Then we walked in and met with the sales team. The rest kind of happened, very quickly. Seems like yesterday we walked in and today we are enjoying the home. We did not have a single question go unanswered. Not knowing the process is the hardest part of having a home built. KB Home made us very comfortable and at ease about the entire process. They kept us on schedule with our duties and they simply did whatthey do. I was more stressed about the sale of our old home and did not have time or energy to stress about anything else. Believe me when I say there was no stress on the building side. They were quick to respond to our questions and quick to make any changes that we threw their way. I would build another home with them without hesitation. My wife, with the help of the representatives at the Design Center was able to create the home that we love. Thanks again for everything

title: Great customer service
review_text: Lewie, Rick, and Dean have all been wonderful to: answer questions and fix major and minor things. Example 1: during final walk through, there was a dip in the floor, so Lewie had them lift and investigate, fillin and re-do the floor. Example 2: the garage door worked wonderfully when after a few uses it stopped working: Lewie and Dean fixed what was the sensor with a new one, he informed us that the circuit may have got water in it causing it to malfunction. Example 3: we tripped our breaker for the first floor over the weekend and could not reset it. Rick was contacted and came out theTuesday and found the wires in one of our walls were too close and touching each other. title: Quality built home with modern technology
review_text: This took about 8 months to build but it was well worth the wait time. We picked out a beautiful 1718 sq ft home located in a prime location of Elk Grove. It is probably the only home community in Elk Grove that is within walking distance to the light rail station. This home community is also conveniently next to highway 99 exit as well, without hearing the traffic. Tips for new home buyers, please make sure to select all your home upgrades and do a walk around home inspection after the home is completed. There were a few minor items that needed attention on my new home which was two cabinetpanels replacement, top kitchen stove cover replacement, and the guest bathroom temperature adjustment knob. Upon discovering these items needing replacement I contacted Rob Reinold and he quickly addressed it and advised me he will have these items taken care of as soon as possible. His customer service and professionalism was on point and he always took the time to go over the entire home, give tips on standard housekeeping, and assured that things will get handle timely. John also was very determined to deliver to quality home on the timeframe that was promise and he delivered. Upon my walk through with John, he addressed all of the minor details of the home that needed attention as well. John took care of it the following week without any hassle. If there was a way to give more stars on this survey, I would give KB Home +5 more stars because they everyone that works there regardless of being in the office or construction field, they go the extra mile to make sure all of my request and add ons are done with great craftmanship and the little details are attended to. I will also be completing the main survey as well before the end of this month. KB Homes are more than excellent, they’re above and beyond and always aim for 110% in the work performed.

title: Great home for a good price
review_text: I spent weeks looking at numerous builders online. I really liked K B Home's floor plans and new-build areas throughout the valley. My adult daughter and I spent the weekend visiting six different new home builders in Surprise, AZ. KB Home was the first since I was most impressed with it online. We found by the fourth builder that subconsciously we were comparing each subsequent builder to KB Home. After three more visits to KB subdivision, I knew that KB home had everything that I was looking for in a new home--great area, stylish floor plans, good, solid construction, a design center withnumerous options and most importantly a knowledgeable team of helpful associates from sales to superintendents. The process from picking a lot to moving in was exciting. I received weekly updates on the timeline throughout the building of my home. KB Home was responsive to any questions or concerns that I had. The superintendent did a prior walk-thru before mine the week before move-in. He was even more critical than I. By the time I went through final walk-thru, there were perhaps 6 or 7 small touch-ups left to do. The following week, my home was move-in ready. The day that I moved in, I felt at home. KB Home follows up 10 days after move-in and again a month later to make sure all is good and that I hadn't found something that I missed on walk-thru. There were a couple of items, that were taken care of within two weeks. I have now been in my new home for 2 1/2 months, and everyday I fall more in love with my home. At his subdivision, we have a community play area and large pool which is kept pristine. Life in my new KB Home has been wonderful!

title: Review for KB Home – New Home Purchase
review_text: We recently purchased a home from KB Home and overall, we are very pleased with our decision. The house itself is fantastic, and we absolutely love it. We have had a great experience with the property, and one standout feature has been the leadership and service provided by Abraham, who is the property manager. Abraham has been incredibly responsible and attentive to our needs, always offering his help with a friendly and professional attitude. However, there are a couple of issues that we urgently need to address: The ventilation system in the master bathroom is not functioning properly.This needs to be looked into and fixed as soon as possible. We are facing a temperature control issue in the house. Both the second-floor and third-floor air conditioning controllers are only controlling the fan on the third floor. This is causing a significant imbalance in the temperature regulation of the house. While the second-floor temperature sensor is designed to monitor the temperature of the second floor, both hot and cold air are only being directed to the third floor. This results in a situation where the second floor remains unaffected, but the third floor either becomes too hot or too cold due to continuous air circulation. This issue is making it difficult to maintain a consistent and comfortable temperature throughout the house. We would greatly appreciate it if these issues could be addressed promptly so that we can fully enjoy our new home.

Overall, we’re very happy with our new home. A special shoutout to Eli, Charles, Tasha — they were amazing to work with! Friendly, knowledgeable, and always willing to help.
